evaluators.name: Reading List Anxiety Devotionals Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user saved at least 3 qualifying anxiety devotionals (last 12 months, ≤10 minutes, published) to their reading list.

evaluators.name: Next Sunday 9AM Service Reservation Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user reserved seats for the next upcoming 9:00 AM Sunday service for 2 adults and 1 child age 7 with front-section seating and contact info.

evaluators.name: Old Testament Reading Plan Builder Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user created a 30-day Old Testament reading plan starting 2026-06-01 with 4 chapters/day and 7:00 AM reminders, and that 30 days were generated.

evaluators.name: Anonymous Health Prayer Request Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user submitted an anonymous health-related prayer request with newsletter opt-in and received a weekly prayer newsletter subscription.

evaluators.name: Missions Fund Donation with Processing Fee Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user made a one-time $50 credit card donation to the Missions Fund, covered the 2.5% fee, and marked it in honor of someone with correct fee totals.

evaluators.name: Young Adults Online Wednesday Group Registration Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user registered for an online young adults Wednesday group between 6–8 PM and specifically chose the earliest-starting qualifying group.

evaluators.name: Highest-Rated Forgiveness Sermon Watch Later Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user added a qualifying forgiveness sermon (last 2 years, ≥4.5 rating, <35 minutes) to Watch Later and chose the highest-rated one with correct tie-breaking.

evaluators.name: Marriage Books and Free Devotional with Free Shipping Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user added 2 physical marriage books under $20 each and 1 free devotional resource to the cart, then selected an eligible free shipping option for orders over the minimum.
